fundamentals.name: AppLovin Corporation
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: AppLovin Corporation provides end-to-end artificial intelligence-powered advertising solutions for businesses in the United States and internationally. It operates through two segments, Advertising and Apps. The company offers Axon Ads Manager, a suite of marketing solutions that enables developers to automate, optimize, and manage marketing efforts; MAX, an in-app bidding technology that optimizes the value of a publisher's advertising inventory by running a real-time competitive auction; Adjust, a measurement and analytics marketing platform; and Wurl, a connected TV platform, which distributes streaming video for content companies, provides advertising and publishing solutions. It serves individuals, small and independent businesses, enterprises, advertisers and advertising networks, mobile app publishers, and indie studio developers. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, California.

judgment.summary: AppLovin demonstrates exceptional growth and profitability with strong margins and returns, though it carries significant debt relative to equity.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 3.4% (3.56 vs 3.44); next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Revenue growth 59.0% YoY and earnings growth 113.1% YoY indicate robust top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin at 64.3% and operating margin at 78.2% are exceptionally high, showcasing strong operational efficiency.
Return on equity at 266.4% and return on assets at 44.2% point to highly effective use of shareholder capital and assets.
Free cash flow of $3.18B TTM provides substantial operational cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'strong buy' with a mean target price significantly above the current spot price.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 162.89 is high, indicating substantial leverage.
Forward P/E of 22.69, while lower than trailing P/E, still suggests a premium valuation.
Beta of 2.37 indicates higher volatility compared to the broader market.

examples.body: $APP wow. Quite flaccid. The mystery of this stock clearly has shareholders spooked and wanting out. Yes it’s frustrating but still making higher highs and hig…
$APP What the hell happened? When I woke up and left this morning, I saw it was up 10%. How is there only this little left now? This stock is garbage.
$APP so what is exactly happening. Jump and back to opening price. Shit !
